messages.message: Someone wants me to suffer and ruins my dreams because I am smart, talented and pretty and they dislike the fact that I am that way, despite me being friendly. I know usually that is a dead end but I really need to turn this person around so they stop envying and hating me because they have no reason to...
His friends dislike the situation and he seems weak to them and irrational and cruel
But this seems to have no effect so far
What do you mean by that?

messages.message: No, it's not romantic in nature it's more about creative collaboration / signal collaboration. Plus I understand another friend of his may be jealous of me or dislike me in some way

Well I am quite unsure. At first he was fine with me and my creative and intellectual pursuits, and we sort of negotiated on what I would be working on alongside his team and I agreed to doing both art and scientific work. He seemed upset I wouldn't allow him to dictate my personal life ie find a romantic partner and attend more social events - this is the part I criticized, his choice architecting for me.

messages.message:
I see two ways out of it 

- him making a choice (to reward you for what you've already done in the past, to give you something that you feel would be commensurate, and to collaborate again on equal footing) 
- you coming back with power (breaking the gatekeeping outside of his choice)

messages.message: I do like these categories a lot that <@177129656611373056> has in his server
What GitHub has that discord doesn't yet is the ability to move & rename channels (repos) and have all cross reference links still work

If every discord channel & message was mirrored on a public URL then discord would be the perfect platform. I want Walter's project/bot to give us this.

If the owner of the discord (or discord the company) nukes the server, the archives are saved on the public internet (way back machine compatible)
Yes

messages.thread: envy / unearned hatred / mimetic panic and obsession

messages.message:
The levers holding him back from doing so should be:

- shame & fear of your reaction, how much you might want to see from him to make amends
- external social pressure, things that he's said and done to justify the past actions & position, knots that he has to now untie. The tighter/deeper this was the more of a barrier this is right now 
- things he feels resentful for that he never told you (that in his mind justify his actions). Typically this would be something he needed from you but never had that courage to ask. Likely because he was intimidated by your competence along specific axes that he lacked in
messages.thread: envy / unearned hatred / mimetic panic and obsession

messages.message: Him shifting his environment or entering a new social environment even if temporary might nudge him out of this attractor. Like spending time with his mom or something
